allow: Bash(python -m pip install fastapi uvicorn sqlalchemy alembic aiosqlite pydantic pydantic-settings "python-jose[cryptography]" passlib python-multipart "celery[redis]" redis httpx anthropic)
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Backend imports OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK: app imported successfully'\); print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'path'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK v0.5.0'\); print\(len\([r for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'methods'\)]\), 'endpoints'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK v1.0.0'\); print\(len\([r for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'methods'\)]\), 'endpoints total'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\(f'Routes: {len\(app.routes\)}'\); [print\(f'  {r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\) and r.methods]")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('FastAPI app loaded successfully'\); print\('Routes:'\); [print\(f'  {r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\)]")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\(f'OK: {len\([r for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,\\"methods\\"\)]\)} endpoints loaded'\)")
